name: ASSA ABLOY AB (PUBL) ASSA ABLOY
summary: ASSA ABLOY AB is a global leader in access solutions, manufacturing and selling a wide range of locks, doors, gates, and entrance automation products and services. The company's product portfolio includes mechanical and electromechanical locks, digital door locks, access control systems, and doors. ASSA ABLOY AB is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
